headline: Omnicom Reshapes PR Leadership As Data And Commerce Strategy Evolves
summary: Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) is reshaping its public relations and marketing businesses with a series of leadership changes and alliances. Weber Shandwick CEO Susan Howe is retiring, with Karen Pugliese set to take over leadership. Ketchum has appointed Mike Doyle as President and CEO, while Porter Novelli is entering a new alliance and combining its Brussels operations with Ketchum. Omnicom has also appointed Christine Gambino as CEO of its Omni marketing intelligence platform. For investors...
